action: Implement mix bs recent [--since DATE | --days N]: deterministic window scan over the loaded graph, events grouped by class (new nodes, supersessions, evidence appends, materializations, retractions); honors --beliefs PATH
Cover and document bs recent: tests for the window scan and each event class, plus the mix bs help entry
Make mix cb.import reject new-belief ids lacking the graph's namespace prefix (the single prefix all existing ids share; empty, bare, or mixed graphs pass vacuously) before any write
Correct the cb.import moduledoc's bare-id examples (a305 -> cb:a305, a044 -> cb:a044) and document the namespace gate under Validation

Add a dep-resolution check to mix cb.verify.schema: every dep of every active belief resolves in-collection; deps in namespaces the collection's ids never use defer to verify.collection's union check; bare deps are never cross-namespace
Cover dep resolution: resolving dep, dangling local dep, bare-dep incident replay, cross-namespace deferral, and non-active exemption
Extract the belief-free anchor-resolution core (per-line literal matching, first-match tighten warning, out-of-range nth) from CB.Codepath into CB.Anchor, with CB.Codepath delegating

Add mix cb.resolve --file: validate and resolve a JSON array of anchor rows (path/anchor/nth objects or code: URI strings per the c043 grammar) against --root with no belief collection loaded; exit 0 only when every row resolves
Cover the resolver core and the task: CB.Anchor resolution-rule tests plus cb.resolve row parsing (mixed object/URI files, per-index error reporting) and text rendering
Persist a non-empty notes key on both the JSON sink's todo record and the materialized link-back ref (blank or absent notes stay omitted); cover record, ref, and link-back in tests
notes: a523: persistence chosen over dropping the mandate - the notes are real traceability; this materialization is itself the live demonstration that they now land

action: Align the /materialize skill's sink description with the persisted-notes contract (record shape and the action-item key table)
notes: a523: the silent divergence between skill contract and sink behavior is the part that must not survive
